name: 动漫模板
description: 二次元动漫风格提示词模板

templates.name: 日系动漫
templates.prompt: anime style illustration, {character}, {pose}, {expression}, detailed anime eyes, soft shading, vibrant colors, Studio Ghibli inspired, high quality anime art
templates.negative: realistic, photographic, western cartoon, ugly, low quality

templates.name: 赛博朋克
templates.prompt: cyberpunk anime, {character}, futuristic city background, neon lights, holographic displays, tech gear, dark atmosphere, rain effects, anime art style

templates.name: 幻想风格
templates.prompt: fantasy anime, {character}, magical powers, floating islands, mystical creatures, detailed costume, ethereal lighting, epic scene, anime illustration

templates.name: 水彩插画
templates.prompt: watercolor anime illustration, {character}, soft color palette, delicate brush strokes, dreamy atmosphere, paper texture background, artistic style
templates.negative: digital hard edges, photographic, overly detailed

templates.name: 机甲战士
templates.prompt: mecha anime, {character} in giant robot suit, detailed mechanical design, cockpit view, battle scene, dramatic lighting, Gundam style mecha

templates.name: 校园日常
templates.prompt: slice of life anime, {character}, school uniform, classroom setting, sunny day, cherry blossoms, happy expression, warm atmosphere, K-On style

templates.name: 黑暗哥特
templates.prompt: gothic anime, {character}, dark outfit, Victorian style, haunted mansion, mysterious atmosphere, dramatic shadows, anime gothic art

templates.name: 古风和风
templates.prompt: historical anime, {character} in traditional Japanese clothing, samurai or maiko style, bamboo forest, traditional architecture, seasonal setting, elegant pose
